# Files whose bytes determine the wire format. tools/wire-version-guard.sh hashes each one and
# fails if any changed without a BUNDLE_VERSION bump. Keep this list to code that actually decides
# emitted bytes or the accepted byte envelope: every unrelated line in a listed file turns an
# ordinary change into a false wire bump, which degrades the version into a build counter.
#
# Adding a path here is free (widening the guard never needs a bump). Removing one needs an
# explicit '# retired: OLD -> NEW' record below, and the guard then requires the committed corpus
# to be byte-identical, so the claim "the code only moved" is checked rather than trusted.
#
# retired: core/hop-core/src/node.rs -> core/hop-core/src/wire_emit.rs (link framing, session
# plaintext, identify body, and carrier chunking extracted; the remaining production lines of
# node.rs are state machine and bookkeeping that cannot move a wire byte)
#
# retired: core/hop-core/src/access.rs -> core/hop-core/src/wire_stamp.rs (the §35 carriage-stamp
# LAYOUT moved: the CarriageStamp struct and its postcard field order, both domain separators
# HINT_CONTEXT and STAMP_CONTEXT, the TenantId width that is the hint preimage, HINT_BYTES,
# CARRIAGE_EPOCH_MS and epoch_of which fix the emitted epoch value, carriage_hint, stamp_message,
# and Stamper, the only producer of stamp bytes. What remains in access.rs decides whether to
# ACCEPT a stamp, never how one is shaped: KeyServer, the denylist, the precomputed hint buckets,
# the current/previous freshness window, AccessPolicy/Admit, attribute/resolve, and Usage, which
# is a metering atom for the durable ledger and never rides the mesh envelope. A relay refusing a
# stamp it used to admit is a policy change, not a format change, so it cannot move a wire byte;
# the same precedent the node.rs retirement set, where a replay bound stayed out of the manifest)
core/hop-core/src/bundle.rs
core/hop-core/src/crypto.rs
core/hop-core/src/discover.rs
core/hop-core/src/hps.rs
core/hop-core/src/link.rs
core/hop-core/src/reach.rs
core/hop-core/src/session.rs
core/hop-core/src/store.rs
core/hop-core/src/wire_emit.rs
core/hop-core/src/wire_stamp.rs
core/hop-core/src/wire_vectors.rs
